summary: Plan-only inventory classification. The job is an independent live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical, fix/merge disabled, no security-sensitive hydrated items, and low-signal closeout disabled. Each listed open PR is kept independent for maintainer review rather than closed, merged, or grouped.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with proof and passing checks, but no close/merge/fix action is allowed or justified in this inventory shard; retain as independent maintainer-review work.
Open focused contributor PR with supplied proof and no shared canonical; preserve it as independent maintainer-review work rather than closing or treating it as a duplicate.
Open focused contributor PR with passing evidence and no duplicate/supersession evidence; keep independent for maintainer technical review.
Open high-risk but substantive contributor PR with supplied proof; it is independent maintainer-review work and should not be closed, grouped, or merged by this plan.
Open small focused contributor PR with proof and passing checks; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or security routing evidence exists, so keep independent.
